title: Oil prices rebound ~1% — Brent $101.29, WTI $95.42 after 3-day slide; weekly loss >6%
snippet: Oil prices edged higher after US fired on Iranian tankers and UAE reported new missile attacks. Brent crude futures settled at $101.29/bbl (+1.2%), WTI at $95.42/bbl (+0.7%). However, both posted weekly losses of >6% as markets priced in hopes of a peace deal.
tag_reason: 5/8 신규 유가 데이터. 전일 대비 반등이나 주간 6% 이상 하락.
